microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end delivery** of Azure's resilience validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built and shipped an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase agent execution capacity by 21%—directly mirroring the build-and-iterate model used in enterprise AI agent deployments.

Led 0→1 development of a Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution from manual coordination to a scalable, repeatable delivery model.

Configured and validated a rack-level proactive testing capability in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects—applying structured test-and-iterate methodology to enterprise-grade production environments.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ contract, interfacing with senior technical stakeholders to define success criteria, align cross-org execution, and drive delivery against strict compliance and timeline requirements.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI agent adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by conducting live demos and hands-on training sessions that translated LLM-powered code generation capabilities into concrete workflow integrations, saving **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Surfaced critical feature gaps through 11+ structured user interviews with senior technical stakeholders, directly influencing the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** and tightening the feedback loop between customer needs and platform evolution.

Improved agent reliability and retrieval quality by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and establishing repeatable validation practices for LLM-backed workflows.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M in revenue impact** through structured stakeholder engagement and clear delivery planning.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to map 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, translating customer-side operational pain into a **structured automation roadmap** that defined clear success criteria and prioritized high-impact integration paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface integration gaps, target automation investments, and maintain a repeatable framework for deployment-readiness validation.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **end-to-end migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit OS transition, mapping integration dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime—demonstrating structured delivery execution in a complex, production-grade environment.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration workflow across cross-functional stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and driving consistent delivery velocity across a fast-moving technical team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that standardized customer requirements intake and accelerated time-to-close.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to align messaging with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, translating raw operational data into actionable financial insights that directly shaped go-forward business strategy.
